title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Researchers at the University of Cambridge use AlphaFold, Gemini, and Co-Scientist to decode bacterial defense mechanisms against antibiotics. The AI-enabled approach compresses analysis timescales from years to minutes to support drug development against antimicrobial resistance.
